settings.title: Unbox
settings.body: Your Lumisca device arrives ready to use.

settings.title: Treat
settings.body: 10 minutes a day, from your sofa.

settings.name: Sarah M.
settings.body: 10 weeks with the Lumisca cap and I genuinely can't believe the difference. My hairdresser noticed before I even told her.

settings.name: Claire B.
settings.body: I was spending £80 a month on facials. This paid for itself in the first month. My skin looks brighter after 6 weeks.

settings.name: James T.
settings.body: 15 minutes before bed and I sleep better than I have in years.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Sleep: from night one. Skin: from week 4. Hair regrowth: week 8-12. Consistency matters — 4-5 sessions per week.

settings.question: Is red light therapy safe?
settings.answer: Yes. Non-invasive, non-thermal, non-UV. Clinically studied in dermatology for over 20 years. Every Lumisca device is CE-certified.

settings.question: How often should I use it?
settings.answer: 4-5 sessions per week is the clinical sweet spot. Each session is 15-25 minutes with auto-shutoff.

settings.question: What's in the box?
settings.answer: The device, USB-C charging cable, premium storage pouch and illustrated user guide. Bundles include a branded gift box and welcome card.
